upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vi SuzRasya saNgraTitamanarvA vidat' (f॰10.61.13) saNgraTitam=sannadDam sandfbDam sambadDam
'tena saNgraTitAH sumanasa AbaDnAmi yaSo mayi' (pA॰gf॰2.7) saNgraTitAH=gumPitAH
'tadyaTA punarAgranTaM punarnigranTamantaM baDnIyAnmayUKaM vAntato DAraRAya nihanyAt tAdfk tat' (E0 brA0 515)
'tadyaTA punarAgranTaM punarnirgranTamantaM baDnIyAt mayUKaM vA'ntato DAraRAya nihanyAt tAdfk tat' (E0 brA0 515) asyApyarTanirdeSAyeha punaranuvAdaH AgranTamAgraTyAgraTya
'tadyaTA punarAgranTaM punirnigranTaM baDnIyAnmayUKaM vA'ntato DAraRAya nihanyAt tAdfk tat' (E0 brA0 515)
'karmASayaM graTitamudgraTayanti santaH' (BA0 pu0 42239) udgraTayanti granTiBedanaM kurvanti graTa iti kavikalpito DAtuH
